items.title: Frontier Power USA Formed to Accelerate Deployment of American-Made Long-Duration Energy Storage Infrastructure
items.excerpt: Frontier Power USA (“Frontier” or the “Company”), a newly established long duration energy storage development and investment platform, today announced its formation to accelerate the deployment of critical, utility scale storage infrastructure across the United States.…
